Chart 02 · Column comparison

Bar chart (vertical)

Categorical comparison. Single highlighted bar (navy) draws the eye to the lead datapoint. No gridlines on the simple version, baseline only.

AMinimal · 5 categories with one highlight
640×340
BMedium · 6 bars + average reference line
820×400
CDense · 8 polymers · current vs baseline shadow + YoY delta
